# Google Cloud Skills Boost Reference

Use this skill when you need to:
- frame architecture decisions around Google Cloud core infrastructure
- recall high-level Google Cloud service areas for serverless, data, security, and AI work
- align new Firebase / GCP runtime design with common Google Cloud learning tracks
- translate Google Cloud training themes into implementation checklists or migration plans

## Included references

| File | Purpose |
| --- | --- |
| `references/summary.md` | High-level summary of the accessible Google Cloud Skills Boost content used to build this skill |

## How to use

1. Start with `references/summary.md`
2. Identify the relevant capability area:
   - core infrastructure
   - serverless/runtime
   - data platform
   - AI / ML
   - IAM / security
3. Apply the patterns as architecture guidance, not as product requirements

## Scope note

This skill is a concise internal reference derived from accessible public summaries of the requested
Google Cloud Skills Boost content. It is intended to guide design decisions, not to reproduce the
training material itself.
